text.title: finops-devops-cost-kubernetes Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for finops-devops-cost-kubernetes as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Applying VPA Auto mode to PostgreSQL, Redis, or Kafka pods.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: VPA Auto mode restarts pods to apply new resource requests. Stateful services cannot tolerate unplanned restarts — use VPA Recommendation mode only for stateful workloads; apply changes manually during maintenance windows.
